title: Telephone Operators
description: Provide information by accessing alphabetical, geographical, or other directories. Assist customers with special billing requests, such as charges to a third party and credits or refunds for incorrectly dialed numbers or bad connections. May handle emergency calls and assist children or people with physical disabilities to make telephone calls.

tasks.text: Observe signal lights on switchboards, and dial or press buttons to make connections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate telephone switchboards and systems to advance and complete connections, including those for local, long distance, pay telephone, mobile, person-to-person, and emergency calls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Listen to customer requests, referring to alphabetical or geographical directories to answer questions and provide telephone information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Suggest and check alternate spellings, locations, or listing formats to customers lacking details or complete information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform clerical duties such as typing, proofreading, and sorting mail.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Offer special assistance to persons such as those who are unable to dial or who are in emergency situations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate paging systems or other systems of bells or buzzers to notify recipients of incoming calls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor automated systems for placing collect calls and intervene for a callers needing assistance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Interrupt busy lines if an emergency warrants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance for customers with special billing requests.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide relay service for users who are deaf or hard of hearing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of calls placed and received, and of related toll charges.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Promote company products, services, and savings plans when appropriate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
